# Automated Quality Solutions (AQS)

> Automated Quality Solutions designs and manufactures intelligent automation systems for packaging lines in food, dairy, protein, pharma, and high-care environments. Based in Nampa, Idaho.

## Company Information

- Website: https://www.automatedqs.com
- Location: 1420 W. Karcher Rd., Nampa, ID 83687
- Phone: (208) 297-4420
- Email: sales@automatedqs.com
- Industries Served: Dairy & Ice Cream, Protein & Meat, Bakery & Snacks, Beverages, Fresh Produce, Nutraceuticals/Pharma

## Products

### VeriPak SCADA — Standalone Packaging Quality Control Platform
- URL: https://www.automatedqs.com/solutions/veripak
- Purpose-built SCADA system that centralizes, records, and reports inspection data from QC devices across the packaging line
- Connects metal detectors, checkweighers, X-ray, label printers, and code date systems into a unified, auditable quality control network
- Allen-Bradley CompactLogix PLC + Optix HMI
- Dual-network security architecture (machine network isolated from user network)
- Product-level traceability: every product individually recorded and every event logged
- Available configurations: Standalone SCADA, QC Integration Hub, Leak Detection Module, Full Stack
- Includes optional dual-pull suction integrity testing for detecting pinholes and micro-leaks (mechanical, not vision-based)
- Package Image Historian saves every image for traceability, filterable by code date
- Vendor-agnostic: works with any device with Ethernet/IP or digital I/O

### IntelliPak — Smart Infeed & Product Handling Conveyors
- URL: https://www.automatedqs.com/solutions/intellipak
- Precision product handling for sanitary packaging lines between upstream production and downstream packaging
- Powered by One Motion Mag-Drive (magnetic direct-drive hub motor): no gears, no oil, no backlash
- Capabilities: infeed, gapping, multi-lane collation, merging, zero-pressure accumulation, dynamic batching, precise timing/metering
- Speeds up to 500 PPM, per-lane feed rate up to 320 PPM
- 55% energy savings vs. conventional drives
- IP69K washdown safe, fully sealed, oil-free
- 3-year drive warranty from One Motion
- Allen-Bradley CompactLogix PLC + Optix HMI with Keyence sensor integration
- Ships with full automation onboard, not just conveyance hardware

### Custom Conveyors — Engineered Sanitary Material Handling
- URL: https://www.automatedqs.com/solutions/conveyors
- Purpose-built sanitary conveyor systems engineered for each customer's product, layout, and sanitary requirements
- Types: flat-top belt, modular belt, motorized drive roll (MDR), chain, accumulation, incline/decline, merge/divert, freezer/arctic (-40F/-40C), washdown pallet
- 304/316 stainless steel, continuous TIG-welded frames (no bolted joints, no bacterial harborage)
- Mirror-polished surfaces, sloped and curved design for aggressive water shedding
- Reduces sanitation time by up to 50%
- Tool-less disassembly with quick-release belt lifters
- FDA-approved belting, USDA/3-A compliant
- IP54 through IP69K protection ratings

### EvacuPak — Liquid Recovery System
- URL: https://www.automatedqs.com/solutions/evacupak
- Up to 97% product recovery
- 3A certified, CIP capable
- Patented hygienic lance design
- Full HACCP traceability
- Product never exposed to atmosphere

### Sanitary Robotics — Washdown Robotic Systems
- URL: https://www.automatedqs.com/solutions/robotics
- KUKA and Staubli platforms, true washdown rated
- Palletizing, case packing, pick-and-place
- 316L stainless steel construction
- Rockwell-native programming
- Full end-of-line integration

### Leak Detection — Package Integrity Testing
- URL: https://www.automatedqs.com/solutions/leak-detection
- Dual-pull suction integrity testing (mechanical, not vision-based)
- Stage 1: controlled aspiration measures structural response
- Stage 2: differential aspiration with Delta-Z integrity analysis
- Detects pinholes and micro-leaks invisible to vision systems
- Binary pass/fail with no ML drift or false-positive fatigue
- VeriPak SCADA integrated module

## Key Differentiators

1. Mag-Drive technology eliminates oil leaks, gearbox maintenance, and encoder cables
2. Continuous TIG-welded stainless steel frames (competitors bolt)
3. Standalone packaging SCADA (not middleware or general-purpose)
4. Mechanical leak detection catches defects vision systems miss
5. Dual-network security architecture for IT/OT isolation
6. 100% product-level traceability and audit-ready recordkeeping
7. Allen-Bradley/Rockwell native controls (the standard most food plants already use)
8. Full ecosystem integration: VeriPak + IntelliPak + Leak Detection + Robotics

## Technology Partners

- One Motion: Mag-Drive hub motors
- Allen-Bradley / Rockwell Automation: PLC, HMI, VFD
- Keyence: Vision and sensors
- KUKA: Robotics
- NGI: Sanitary hardware
- Intralox / Habasit: FDA-approved belting
- PulseRoller: Washdown MDR conveyors
- Meltric: Power connections
